---
title: "<span class='letter-cap'>D</span><span class = 'fancy'>isaster</span> <span class='letter-cap'>D</span><span class = 'fancy'>ataset</span>"
format: html
include-in-header:
    text: |
      <style>
        h2, h3 {
          color: #6A99A0;
        }
        a {
        color: #6A99A0;
        }
        .title {
        color: #6A99A0;
        font-weight: bold;
        }
        .sidebar nav[role="doc-toc"] ul > li > a {
        color: #6A99A0 !important; 
        }
        .toc-color {
        color: #6A99A0;
        }
        #TOC a.active {
        color: #6A99A0 !important;
        font-weight: demi-bold;
        }
      </style>
toc: true
callout-icon: false
---
